title: GTA 6 reveals its official cover and pre-orders open on June 25
summary: Rockstar Games has unveiled the cover of Grand Theft Auto VI and announces that pre-orders will begin next week, causing Take-Two's shares to soar.

title: Epic Games introduces Unreal Engine 6 with integrated artificial intelligence
summary: The new version of the graphics engine merges Unreal Engine 5 with the Fortnite ecosystem and includes generative AI tools to transform video game development.

title: Vampire Survivors reviews its collaboration with Fortnite due to Epic's focus on generative AI
summary: Studio Poncle is reconsidering its alliance with Fortnite after Epic highlighted generative artificial intelligence at the State of Unreal.

title: OtherSide lays off 17 employees and cancels its immersive simulator Argos
summary: Warren Spector's studio is forced to cancel Argos: Riders on the Storm and lay off staff just days after the release of Thick as Thieves.

title: Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops II are coming to PS4 and PS5 in July
summary: Treyarch confirms ports of the two classic shooters for modern PlayStation consoles, with performance and resolution improvements.

title: Street Fighter 6 adds Yasmine as a new DLC fighter in August
summary: Capcom shows gameplay of the new fighter, who will be available from August 3 with a unique fighting style inspired by dance.

title: Jim Carrey returns as The Grinch in the sequel 25 years later
summary: The actor confirmed his participation in How the Grinch Stole Christmas 2, reprising his iconic role in the Christmas film.

title: The Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer reveals Hulk and keeps Sadie Sink under a hood
summary: The first trailer for the new Spider-Man movie includes the appearance of Hulk and leaves many questions about Sadie Sink's role.

title: Citizen Sleeper, the acclaimed sci-fi RPG, is being given away on the Epic Games Store
summary: The narrative RPG with 93% positive reviews on Steam will be available for free for a week on the Epic Store.

title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok demo is now available
summary: Players can try the enhanced version of the action RPG on Switch 2, which according to initial impressions adapts perfectly to the console.

title: Gang of Dragon, the spiritual successor to Yakuza, appears to be canceled
summary: The project led by Toshihiro Nagoshi faces an uncertain future and close sources indicate that development has stopped.

title: The System Shock remake almost got canceled due to lack of funds, but a small team saved it
summary: Nightdive Studios developers reveal how they completed the game after running out of money mid-development.

title: Valve releases a SteamOS update with initial support for Steam Machines
summary: The new version of the operating system includes display improvements and paves the way for Steam Machines hardware.

title: Former PlayStation executives criticize Xbox strategy and anticipate more layoffs
summary: Shawn Layden and other veterans point out that Microsoft does not understand the interactive entertainment industry, while uncertainty over Xbox studios grows.

title: Pokémon Pokopia starts the Wish Upon a Jirachi event next week
summary: The special event will allow players to obtain Jirachi and other exclusive rewards for a limited time.

title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millenium Tales receives positive reviews and item guides
summary: The indie adventure game arrives with good reviews, while players search for all the hidden glass jars in the game.

title: Dave the Diver: In the Jungle now available with new content and recipes
summary: The expansion of the acclaimed game adds a jungle full of secrets, new fish, recipes, and items for players.

title: Epic launches Lumen Lite for Unreal Engine 5, improving performance on Switch 2 and PC
summary: The new ray tracing lighting option offers up to 60% more graphical performance, ideal for devices with limited power.

title: Bloodborne can now run at 120 FPS on PS5 via a mod
summary: A mod allows unlocking the frame rate of the FromSoftware title on Sony's console, improving the game's smoothness.

title: Palworld: developers say players don't want AI in video games
summary: The Palworld studio speaks out against the use of generative artificial intelligence, stating that the community rejects this trend.
